name: @c15t/embed
description: Standalone embed script for c15t consent management on CMS platforms.

scripts.build: bunx esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/c15t.js --format=iife --target=es2020 --platform=browser --minify --conditions=import && bunx esbuild src/ui/c15t.css --bundle --outfile=dist/c15t.css --minify
